summary: This is a brief announcement post noting that Chinese (Simplified) and Hungarian translations of Joel on Software are now available. The post contains no substantive argument or analysis, serving purely as a site update notification.
key_points: Joel on Software expanded to Chinese (Simplified) and Hungarian translations
The post reflects the blog's growing international readership circa 2002
key_insight: This is a minor housekeeping announcement with no substantive technical or editorial content.
